name: HMS ML 152 (ML 152)
events: 18 Sep 1944 HMS Uproar (Lt. J.N. Devlin, DSC, RN) proceeded to Douglas, Isle of Man upon completion of the exercises off Morecambe Bay. She arrived at Douglas around 0940 B/18 being escorted to there by HMML 145 (T/Lt. G.S. Sykes, RNVR) which had joined around 0700 A/18.
Around 1230 A/18, she departed Douglas to return to the exercise area. HMML 145 and HMML 152 (T/S.Lt. T.O. Roberts, RNVR) being in company as escorts.
At 1925 A/18, she entered Douglas harbour once more escorted by HMML 152. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
